title: SEO Audit
description: Audit websites for SEO issues — meta tags, headings, crawlability, content quality, technical foundations, and performance hints
author: Jarvis Inc

commands.name: audit
commands.description: Full SEO audit of a webpage — fetches the page and analyzes meta tags, headings, content structure, links, and technical SEO signals

returns.description: Comprehensive SEO audit report with scores and recommendations

commands.name: check_meta
commands.description: Quick check of meta tags, Open Graph, and Twitter Card data for a URL

returns.description: Meta tag analysis with present/missing tags and recommendations
